project.name: CareerLinkAI
project.description: AI-assisted career & college guidance platform for senior high school students
stack: TypeScript on Cloudflare Workers (Hono + Zod + Drizzle/D1)
Cloudflare (D1, R2, Vectorize, Workers AI, Queues, KV)
project.deployment: Existing careerlinkai.online Worker (API) + careerlinkai.online Pages project (frontend)
project.note: This file never restates the architecture. Every specific (schema, endpoints, formulas) is looked up in FULLPLAN.md. Values here are working conventions only.

backend.runtime: Cloudflare Workers (one Worker: HTTP API + queue consumers)
backend.validation: Zod - one schema per write endpoint
backend.dataAccess: Drizzle ORM over the D1 binding
backend.testing: Vitest via @cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers (runs in workerd with real local bindings)

patterns.handlers: Thin: Zod schema -> one Service method -> serialized envelope
patterns.persistence: Drizzle queries inside Services are the repository - no Repository layer
patterns.models: No model classes - src/db/schema.ts defines every table once; row types via $inferSelect
patterns.events: Exactly 4, in-process dispatcher - see FULLPLAN section 11
patterns.jobs: Cloudflare Queues messages consumed by the same Worker's queue() handler - heavy work never runs in a request handler

frontend.organization: Feature-based: src/features/{module}/ owns its api, components, pages, hooks, types
frontend.apiAccess: Component -> hook -> services/{module}Api.ts. Never call the API from a component.

database.primaryKeys: UUID v4, column name 'id'. No auto-increment integers, ever.
database.enums: No native ENUM in D1/SQLite. Use TEXT + CHECK constraint in the migration SQL, string-literal union on the Drizzle column.
database.softDeletes: Business entities only (users, classes, colleges, programs, careers, assessment_templates). NEVER on the attempt -> answer -> result chain.
database.migrations_path: backend/migrations/ (plain SQL, wrangler d1 migrations apply)
database.migrationRule: Append-only. Never edit a shipped migration.

workflow.phasePlan: FULLPLAN Part XVI section 57 - Phases 0 through 6 plus Phase 3.5 Platform Port (vertical slices, each ending in a demo)
workflow.currentFocus: Phase 3.5 - port the Phase 0-3 scope from the retired Laravel implementation to the Worker stack; blocks Phase 4
workflow.withinPhase: Layered: migrations -> schema types -> auth -> policies -> services -> routes/API -> frontend
rules: Only work on the explicitly requested phase. Never skip ahead. Never auto-continue.
Before coding, state: goal, files affected, dependencies, risks, step-by-step plan.
Never invent tables, rename fields, change API contracts, or alter folder structure.
The port must not change the HTTP contract - the unchanged React frontend is the check.
If FULLPLAN is unclear or silent, ask. Do not invent.

assessments.enforcement: generateWithAi policy function - first check, API layer, not the UI
assessments.confirmationGate: A version cannot reach status=PUBLISHED while any question_dimensions row has confirmed_at IS NULL
assessments.immutability: PUBLISHED versions are write-rejected in the Service layer. Assignments and attempts reference assessment_version_id, never a template.

authentication.mechanism: First-party bearer tokens for BOTH flows (api_tokens table: SHA-256-hashed opaque tokens with expiry; not sessions)
authentication.staff: POST /auth/login - email + password, PBKDF2-SHA256 (WebCrypto), min 10 chars, 5 fails -> 15-min lock
authentication.students: POST /student-access/join - class code + per-class username. users.password IS NULL for every student, permanently.
authentication.studentErrorPolicy: Wrong class code and wrong username must return an IDENTICAL generic error (prevents roster enumeration)

authorization.mechanism: Plain policy functions in src/policies/ only - no database permission tables
authorization.enforcement: authorize(...) on every handler touching a specific record
authorization.studentDataScoping: Students see only their own data
authorization.counselorDataScoping: Counselors see only their own classes

recommendations.determinism: The recommendation engine is fully deterministic. AI writes only the explanation of an already-computed result - never the score or the ranking.

rateLimits.ai: 10/min on /ai/* and the AI-generation endpoint group
rateLimits.studentAccess: 10 FAILED per 15min per (class code, IP) - failures only, there is no user yet

never_hardcode: Credentials (Cloudflare services are bindings; deploy tokens live in CI secrets; runtime secrets via wrangler secret)
AI policies (they live in the ai_policies table)
toolRestrictions.always_validate: User input server-side via the endpoint's Zod schema, before it reaches a Service
toolRestrictions.always_scope: Student/class data, to prevent cross-class leakage
toolRestrictions.always_inject: Active ai_policies into every AI prompt
